weight_transform: Weight tensor passed unchanged from the standalone matmul (weight_tt); bias passed unchanged (bias_tt). No additional transform required for fusion.
applicability_notes: Fuses a matmul (with optional bias) with an async reduce_scatter CCL along the scatter dim, overlapping compute and communication. Requires preallocated persistent intermediate and output buffers, a multi-device global semaphore, and a disjoint core grid region (reduce_scatter_core_grid_offset) so matmul and CCL workers do not contend. golden_src is unregistered; torch-level pattern reconstructed from the unfused else-branch in the unit test (separate matmul then reduce_scatter_async).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: full matmul output shape (pre-scatter), per device
placement_observations.source: test: persistent_intermediate_buffers[i] preallocated per mesh-device iteration before the fused call

placement_observations.size_descriptor: matmul output shape with dim {SCATTER_DIM} divided by num_devices
placement_observations.source: test: persistent_output_buffers[i] preallocated per mesh-device iteration before the fused call

placement_observations.program_config: reduce_scatter_core_grid_offset=(0, 6) — CCL workers placed starting at row 6, disjoint from matmul compute grid
